Localization.Description: An attempt to log in to the SafeInspect web interface

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The local user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the system on host {event_src.host}
The remote user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}. The LDAP server is located on host {datafield3}:{datafield4}.
The local user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host}
